parents.subject: LU-20096 ldlm: alloc stats before procfs

commit.subject: LU-19323 lst: update internals for large NIDs
commit.message:
LU-19323 lst: update internals for large NIDs

Internally to LNet selftest move everything over to large NID
handling to prepare support for IPv6. Data sent over the wire
and receieved from user land are still small NID format.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=lnet-selftest
Change-Id: Ic77df42e02f8c21f6db52f8ee4f4d2018ec872ef
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
